title: Command
drDigitalIntro: Command is the main action key on a Mac, used in shortcuts to tell your computer what to do. Hold it and press S to save, or hold it and press P to print. On Windows computers, this key is the Windows key instead.
drDigitalSuccess: That's Command — the key that powers almost every handy shortcut!
drDigitalHint: Look for Command (⌘) next to the space bar, then click Continue.
